productDisplayName: Fossil Women Copper Chronograph Watch CH2589
description: Style NoteThe heart and soul of the fossil brand is a unique kind of inspired creativity. This watch represents the brands concept of accessible cool, creative spirit and a sense of humor - which is also evident in the trademark collectible tin. Fossil creates modern yet vintage products for everyone, choose this watch to express you own creativity and authentic style.Product DetailsCase style: Analog watch in copper with a stainless steel round case Dial style: Copper dial with white hands Strap style: Steel strap in copper with a butterfly claspFeatures: Three chronograph time displays and branding on the 12 hour markWater resistant 5 ATM that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 29 mm Case thickness: 4 mmWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
